item.title: The Thames Never Fails To Surprise Me
item.description: Join a mudlarking adventure along the River Thames, uncovering unexpected artifacts and hidden treasures that reveal fascinating stories from the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: The Thames Never Fails To Surprise Me
media:content.media:description: Join a mudlarking adventure along the River Thames, uncovering unexpected artifacts and hidden treasures that reveal fascinating stories from the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: I Found A Military Pocket Watch While Mudlarking!
item.description: While mudlarking along the riverbank, a historic military pocket watch is uncovered, offering a glimpse into the past and the stories behind lost artifacts. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: I Found A Military Pocket Watch While Mudlarking!
media:content.media:description: While mudlarking along the riverbank, a historic military pocket watch is uncovered, offering a glimpse into the past and the stories behind lost artifacts. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: This Piece Of Pottery Has Such A Lovely Design!
item.description: While exploring, a beautifully designed piece of pottery is uncovered, showcasing craftsmanship, detail, and a glimpse into its historical context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: This Piece Of Pottery Has Such A Lovely Design!
media:content.media:description: While exploring, a beautifully designed piece of pottery is uncovered, showcasing craftsmanship, detail, and a glimpse into its historical context. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: I Never Expected to Find This Gem After 100 Years in the Mud
item.description: After a century in the mud, a remarkable artifact is uncovered, revealing a glimpse of history and the story behind this rare find. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: I Never Expected to Find This Gem After 100 Years in the Mud
media:content.media:description: After a century in the mud, a remarkable artifact is uncovered, revealing a glimpse of history and the story behind this rare find. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Strange Find: A Nailed Wooden Dog in the River!
item.description: While exploring the riverbank, a curious wooden dog with nails is discovered. This video looks at the unusual find and the questions about its origin and purpose. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Strange Find: A Nailed Wooden Dog in the River!
media:content.media:description: While exploring the riverbank, a curious wooden dog with nails is discovered. This video looks at the unusual find and the questions about its origin and purpose. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
